---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new language, runtime, tooling, or UX capability
title: "feature: "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem statement

What operator/developer pain point does this solve?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the desired ratified behavior in concrete terms.

## Scope

Select all that apply (multi-committee selection allowed):

- [ ] Language syntax/semantics
- [ ] Diagnostics
- [ ] Runtime or VM behavior
- [ ] CLI/tooling (`javec`, `baggage`, `javevm`)
- [ ] VS Code extension/docs
- [ ] Governance And/Or Steering

## Example

If relevant, provide an example proposal snippet:

```jave
// Example usage
```

## Alternatives considered

List alternatives considered and why they were not sponsor-aligned.

## Compatibility and risk

- Breaking change? (yes/no)
- Spec change needed? (yes/no)
- Migration concerns?

## Additional context

Links to prior issues, governance notes, minutes, or specs.
